Card Highlights Book Any Flight Use your Avion points to book any flight, anytime, on over 500 airlines. No blackouts or seat restrictions, even during peak season † ! Use Points Your Way Redeem your Avion points for other travel related expenses and more. Plus, Avion points never expire 15 . Discover the Infinite Possibilities with Visa Infinite Access a world of curated experiences and personalized service. Learn More Travel 22 Access the Visa Infinite Hotel Collection and enjoy benefits like free nights at premium hotels, discounts, room upgrades and free breakfasts at over 900 Visa Infinite Luxury Hotel Collection properties around the world. Visa Infinite card holders also have discounts at Park n’ Fly, Viator and Via Rail. Food and Wine 22 Indulge in curated dining events from some of the finest restaurants around Canada with the Visa Infinite Dining Series. Also enjoy Visa Infinite Wine Country benefits like complimentary tastings, discounted wine deliveries and free shipping from select wineries. International Data 22 Stay connected in 175+ countries with discounted GigSky data using your eligible Visa card. Visa Infinite cardholders get 1GB/15 days complimentary plan, plus 20% off all plans on eSIM-compatible devices. Complimentary Concierge 23 Whether you're looking to book travel plans, get a restaurant recommendation or find that perfect gift, Visa's complimentary concierge service will do the research for you and help save you time, with 24/7 availability to help make your experience extraordinary.

The coverage also doubles the manufacturer’s original Canadian warranty for up to one extra year. Card Highlights Enjoy a Consistently Low Interest Rate Get a low, fixed annual interest rate of 12.99% on purchases, cash advances and balance transfers 1 . No surprises. Shop With Confidence Your RBC Visa Classic Low Rate Option card includes purchase security and extended warranty coverage 4 . Access Funds Whenever, Wherever Accepted wherever you see the Visa logo, at more than one million ATMs and 24 million establishments in 170 countries Worldwide. Unlock Exclusive Partner Offers Get special partner offers from brands like Petro Canada, Rexall and DoorDash. How to Use Your Fixed Low Annual Interest Rate Credit Card Balance Your Budget With a low interest rate card, you pay less in interest charges and make your payments more affordable. Fund an Unexpected Purchase Have a safety net for unexpected expenses like car repairs or medical bills, minimizing the interest costs. Consolidate Your Debt Transfer high-interest balances to a low-interest rate card, which can help you save money on interest charges and pay down your balances faster.
